tools.name: FFmpeg Video
tools.description: Cortar, converter, juntar videos. Extrair frames. Adicionar audio.

commands.name: concat
commands.usage: python3 tool_video.py concat output.mp4 video1.mp4 video2.mp4

commands.name: add-audio
commands.description: Adicionar faixa de audio a video
commands.usage: python3 tool_video.py add-audio video.mp4 audio.mp3 output.mp4

tools.name: ImageMagick
tools.description: Converter, redimensionar, compor, adicionar texto a imagens. Criar sprites.

commands.name: compose
commands.usage: python3 tool_image.py compose base.png overlay.png output.png --position 10,20

commands.name: text
commands.usage: python3 tool_image.py text input.png output.png --text 'Hello' --size 48 --color white

commands.name: sprite-sheet
commands.description: Criar sprite sheet a partir de frames

tools.name: FFmpeg Audio
tools.description: Converter, cortar, mixar audio. Extrair audio de video.

commands.name: mix
commands.usage: python3 tool_audio.py mix track1.mp3 track2.mp3 output.mp3

tools.name: Whisper (Speech-to-Text)
tools.description: Transcrever audio/video para texto. Gerar legendas SRT.

commands.name: transcribe
commands.usage: python3 tool_audio.py transcribe audio.mp3 --model medium --language pt

commands.name: subtitles
commands.usage: python3 tool_audio.py subtitles video.mp4 output.srt --model medium

tools.name: edge-tts (Text-to-Speech)
tools.description: Gerar voz a partir de texto via Microsoft Edge TTS. Vozes PT-PT e PT-BR. Requer internet.

commands.name: speak
commands.description: Gerar audio a partir de texto

commands.name: speak-file
commands.description: Gerar audio a partir de ficheiro de texto

tools.name: Bark (Audio Generation)
tools.description: Gerar voz expressiva, musica, efeitos sonoros a partir de texto. Usa GPU.

commands.name: bark-generate
commands.description: Gerar audio com Bark (voz expressiva, musica, efeitos)

tools.name: Blender (3D)
tools.description: Modelacao 3D, rendering, animacao. Scripting via Python headless.

commands.name: render
commands.usage: python3 tool_3d.py render scene.blend output.png --engine CYCLES --samples 128

commands.name: render-animation
commands.description: Renderizar animacao .blend para frames ou video
commands.usage: python3 tool_3d.py render-animation scene.blend output_dir/ --format PNG --fps 24

commands.name: run-script
commands.description: Executar script Python no Blender headless

commands.name: export
commands.description: Exportar cena para outro formato (glTF, FBX, OBJ)
commands.usage: python3 tool_3d.py export scene.blend output.glb --format GLTF

tools.name: Manim (Animacao Matematica)
tools.description: Criar animacoes matematicas e explicativas via Python scripting.

commands.name: render
commands.usage: python3 tool_animation.py render scene.py ClassName --quality medium

commands.name: render-all
commands.description: Renderizar todas as cenas de um ficheiro

tools.name: Pygame
tools.description: Framework para jogos 2D em Python. Agentes geram scripts pygame.

tools.name: Godot Engine
tools.description: Motor de jogos 2D/3D com editor headless. Export para Linux, Web, Android.

tools.name: Tiled Map Editor
tools.description: Editor de mapas 2D (tilemaps). Exportar para JSON/TMX.

tools.name: Diffusers (HuggingFace — Geração de Imagens)
tools.description: Gerar imagens via Stable Diffusion, SDXL, etc. Biblioteca Python. 100% local, GPU recomendada.
tools.replace_reason: ComfyUI requer CUDA 13.0, driver é CUDA 12.8. Instalação partia o torch.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Gerar imagem a partir de prompt de texto
commands.usage: python3 tool_ai.py generate 'a fantasy castle at sunset' output.png --steps 20 --width 512 --height 512

commands.name: img2img
commands.description: Gerar imagem a partir de outra imagem + prompt
commands.usage: python3 tool_ai.py img2img input.png 'oil painting style' output.png --strength 0.7

tools.name: rembg (Remove Background)
tools.description: Remover fundo de imagens automaticamente. Usa modelo U2NET local.

tools.name: yt-dlp (Download)
tools.description: Download de videos e audio de YouTube e 1000+ sites. Assets para projectos.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Ver informacoes do video sem download

tools.name: GIMP (batch mode)
tools.description: Edicao avancada de imagem via Script-Fu batch (sem GUI).

tools.name: Open3D
tools.description: Processamento de nuvens de pontos 3D e meshes. Visualizacao headless.
